noveltyJustification: Seven mechanism/outcome distinctions are new to this lineage and one finding qualifies later gate evidence rather than merely repeating implementation claims.

label: Compaction recovery used bounded cache-and-inject hooks

direction: Infer optimization outcomes from completion labels or projections
